hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

The magnitude of the Force Delta (U∆) can be used as a physics-informed regularization term during neural network training to simultaneously improve both the accuracy and calibration of direct-force predictions, such that models trained with U∆-based regularization will exhibit a more linear (rather than merely monotonic) relationship between U∆ and true error εdirect, enabling direct quantitative error estimation rather than only qualitative uncertainty ranking.
